column1: # Talo translation-exercise bank — a graded progression for the web "Practice"
# tool (docs/0013 reading program). Hand-authored lower levels; the exercise
# generator (tools/exercises) adds higher-level items from grammar templates.
# Every Talo sentence is gated through the parser (tools/exercises --check) and
# every content root must be a real lexicon entry. The English is a natural
# reference; grading normalises (articles/case/punctuation) and also accepts the
# translator's rendering, so learners aren't punished for "a/the".
# Columns: id <TAB> level <TAB> skills <TAB> talo <TAB> english

column5: The dog does not see the cat.
The woman does not drink water.
The child sleeps in the house.
I give the book to the child.
The man comes from the house.
The dog eats food in the house.
I see the dog and the cat.
